title: gnaphalium kraussii
intro: Gnaphalium kraussii, also known as the African buttonbush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the aster family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Gnaphalium kraussii include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Gnaphalium kraussii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
